Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.

HKLII.title: HKLII
HKLII.description: Hong Kong Legal Information Institute — free access to HK judgments, legislation, and legal materials from the Court of Final Appeal, High Court, District Court, and tribunals.

CLIC.title: CLIC (Community Legal Information Centre)
CLIC.description: Hong Kong's Community Legal Information Centre — plain-language legal information, self-help guides, and referral information for common legal problems in Hong Kong.

Westlaw Asia.title: Westlaw Asia
Westlaw Asia.description: Primary law research for Asia-Pacific — Hong Kong judgments, legislation, and commentary from Thomson Reuters.
